---
title: "edfinr Workshop - AEFP26"
subtitle: "Education Finance Data Analysis in R"
---

Welcome to the edfinr Workshop - AEFP26 for EdFund Policy Fellows! This session builds on the February hackathon with **new material** focused on federal-level COVID recovery fund spending analysis.

## Schedule

| Time | Session | Materials |
|---|---|---|
| 10:00–10:15 | Intro to `edfinr` | [Slides](modules/01-refresher/slides.html) |
| 10:15–10:45 | ESSER spending analysis demo | [Slides](modules/02-esser-analysis/slides.html) |
| 10:45–11:00 | Break | |
| 11:00–12:00 | Independent state analysis | [Exercise](exercises/state-analysis.html) |
| 12:00–12:30 | Share out & discussion | |

## Getting started

1. Make sure you have R and RStudio installed
2. Install edfinr: `install.packages("edfinr")`
3. Open the [exercise file](exercises/state-analysis.html) when it's time for independent work

See the [About](about.html) page for full setup instructions and links to prior materials.
